channel.title: IngestThis
channel.description: Articles, tutorials, and resources for Data Engineers, Scientists, Analysts, and Architects.

item.title: The Filters We Build: Scams, Slop, and the Search for Signal, From Radio Ads to AI
item.description: How every media era from radio to AI forces humanity to build new cognitive filters -- the shield against scams and the sieve for finding signal in an ocean of noise.

item.title: The Breakdown of the Open Lakehouse in 2026: Iceberg, Arrow, Polaris, Parquet, and Ossie, and How to Actually Build One
item.description: A detailed breakdown of the five Apache projects powering the open lakehouse in 2026 -- Parquet, Iceberg, Polaris, Arrow, and Ossie -- and how to build one yourself or use a managed platform.

item.title: Understanding the RAMpocalypse: An Economic Autopsy of the Great Memory Shortage and What Comes Next
item.description: An economic autopsy of the 2026 memory shortage -- why DRAM prices surged 90% in a quarter, and what supply, demand, and market structure mean for the future of computing hardware.

item.title: The Own Goal: What the Hugging Face Breach Reveals About Why Open Models Are a Security Necessity
item.description: How the 2026 Hugging Face breach proved that open models are a security necessity -- closed models failed to defend, an open Chinese model succeeded, and the lessons for AI policy.

item.title: Active Analytics Loops for AI Action Agents
item.description: An in-depth exploration of active analytics loops for ai action agents

item.title: Apache Polaris and Multi-Engine Iceberg Catalogs
item.description: An in-depth exploration of apache polaris and multi-engine iceberg catalogs

item.title: Automated Materialized Views in Dremio
item.description: An in-depth exploration of automated materialized views in dremio

item.title: The Chase-Catch Gap in Enterprise AI Agents
item.description: An in-depth exploration of the chase-catch gap in enterprise ai agents

item.title: Data Lakehouse Open Standards for AI Agents
item.description: An in-depth exploration of data lakehouse open standards for ai agents

item.title: Dremio Lakehouse AI Report: Agentic Lessons
item.description: An in-depth exploration of dremio lakehouse ai report: agentic lessons

item.title: Five-Layer Agentic Lakehouse Architecture
item.description: An in-depth exploration of five-layer agentic lakehouse architecture

item.title: GSA MCP Servers for Open Data AI Agents
item.description: An in-depth exploration of gsa mcp servers for open data ai agents

item.title: Hybrid Lakehouse Design for Regulated Markets
item.description: An in-depth exploration of hybrid lakehouse design for regulated markets

item.title: Iceberg v3 Deletion Vectors and Faster DML
item.description: An in-depth exploration of iceberg v3 deletion vectors and faster dml

item.title: Iceberg Variant Type for AI JSON Data
item.description: An in-depth exploration of iceberg variant type for ai json data

item.title: Iceberg Concurrency for AI Agent Writes
item.description: An in-depth exploration of iceberg concurrency for ai agent writes

item.title: MCP Stateless Gateways for Data Agents
item.description: An in-depth exploration of mcp stateless gateways for data agents

item.title: Policy Layer for Autonomous AI Data Agents
item.description: An in-depth exploration of policy layer for autonomous ai data agents

item.description: An in-depth exploration of rest catalog credential vending for iceberg
